# Packet

Packet - Networking library
[Download](https://create.roblox.com/store/asset/104116977416770) | [Video Tutorial](https://youtu.be/WoIElUdj64A) | [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/bEn49K5JUt)

Batching                   "Batches all your events into a single event"
Serialize                  "Serializes all data into one buffer"
Many types                 "16 bit floats + 24 bit floats + many more"
DDoS protection            "Stops exploiters from crashing the server"
Remote Functions           "Safely request a response from the client or server"
Unreliable                 "UnreliableRemoteEvent support"
Easy To Use                "Simple and elegant"

Permission to use, copy, modify, and/or distribute this software for any purpose with or without fee is hereby granted.

# EnzzyFrenzzy

Packet is a RemoteEvent/Function wrapper which serializes, and deserializes
the data sent over for you, in real time. There is no GitHub of the file
that could be found, so you should look at the updates found on the
Devforum post instead. *This module is only used for Roblox.*

Devforum: https://devforum.roblox.com/t/packet-networking-library/3573907
API: Found on the Devforum post
5uphi (creator) channel: https://www.youtube.com/@5uphi
